matcher.command: (pnpm run dev|npm run dev|yarn dev|bun run dev)

hooks.message: [Hook] Consider running dev server in tmux for better log access and session persistence.

hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATH||''; const allowed=['README','CLAUDE','ARCHITECTURE','CHANGELOG','CONTRIBUTING','LICENSE','REFACTORING']; if(f && !allowed.some(a=>f.toUpperCase().includes(a)) && !f.includes('/docs/') && !f.includes('/.claude/')) { console.error('[Hook] Blocked: Random doc files not allowed. Use existing docs or /docs/ folder.'); process.exit(1); }"
hooks.description: Block creation of random .md files outside allowed patterns
Auto-format with Prettier after editing JS/TS files

hooks.message: [Hook] TypeScript file edited. Run `pnpm run typecheck` to verify types.

hooks.command: grep -n 'console\.log' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read line; do echo "[Hook] console.log found: $line"; done || true

hooks.message: [Hook] About to push. Verify: tests pass, types check, no console.logs, commit message is clear.

hooks.description: Check for console.log in modified files
